sentences.arabic: غَضِبَ كَرِيمٌ حِينَ أَخَذَ أَخُوهُ لُعْبَتَهُ بِلَا إِذْنٍ.
sentences.translation: Karim se naljutio kada je brat uzeo njegovu igračku bez dozvole.
sentences.translationEn: Karim got angry when his brother took his toy without permission.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ بِحَرَارَةٍ فِي وَجْهِهِ وَرَفَعَ صَوْتَهُ.
sentences.translation: Osjetio je toplinu u licu i podigao glas.
sentences.translationEn: He felt heat in his face and raised his voice.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ أَخَذَ نَفَسًا وَتَكَلَّمَ بِهُدُوءٍ مَعَ أَخِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Zatim je udahnuo i mirno razgovarao s bratom.
sentences.translationEn: Then he took a breath and spoke calmly with his brother.

sentences.arabic: الْكَلَامُ الْهَادِئُ يَحُلُّ الْمَشَاكِلَ أَفْضَلَ مِنَ الصُّرَاخِ.
sentences.translation: Miran razgovor bolje rješava probleme od vikanja.
sentences.translationEn: Calm speech solves problems better than shouting.
